name: WarehouseHealthMonitor

neutralConcepts: T188 performs read-only health checks — no write operations
Health monitoring is tenant-scoped — no cross-tenant health data exposure
F425 IWarehouseAuditService is NOT required for health reads (audit only required for write operations)
Health check results are ephemeral — no storeDocument required for health probes

ironRules.rule: T188 performs READ-ONLY health checks. No write operations permitted inside the health monitor.
Health monitoring is tenant-scoped — every health query must include tenantId predicate. Cross-tenant health data exposure is forbidden.
F425 IWarehouseAuditService is NOT required for health reads. Audit is only required for write operations (purge, export). Do not add F425 to T188.

keywords: warehouse health monitor read-only health checks tenant-scoped no audit F425 not required analytics data warehouse
